Now that we've imported the funnel of our choice, we're going to go ahead and hook a domain up to it. So in order to do that, we will need to either buy a domain or link one up to ClickFunnels. If you need to link a domain up that you have already purchased, there are a ton of help articles right here that will go over the exact directions for your specific domain provider in order to help you link that up. What we suggest doing at GymLaunch is purchasing a domain from ClickFunnels to make things a little bit simpler. So the way that you do that is you'll simply go up to your profile right here and you'll click on Account Settings. This is just our settings. I clicked a little too hard. So here we go, Account Settings. So from here, you're going to scroll all the way down until it says Domains. Click on Domains and then from here, you will most likely have a pop-up that looks a little bit more like this. So add a new domain because you won't have domains in there already. So from here, you'll just follow the prompts so you'll choose a domain and then you'll search available domain names. Some examples of a domain name might be the city you live in with Challenge amended at the end, so austinchallenge.com if that's available. And if it is available, then it will show you over here. So that's already taken. So we'll just make something up, bestaustinchallenge.com. So when this pops up and it's available, you can then click on this button here. I'm not going to do this because I don't want to actually buy bestaustinchallenge.com, but once you click on this, you'll follow the prompts and it will allow you to buy a domain. So after you have bought a domain, it could take up to 24 hours for that domain to show up in your domain section here. But once it does show up, it'll show up similar to this and you will need to secure the domain So you can see that ours are secured right here, but potato.com is not. So in order to secure the domain, we're going to come over here and click on the edit button. And this is not a real domain, just a little bit more, but in order to secure it, what we would do is we would go down to the SSL here, click expand, and then there would be a button that you would press in order to secure it. So that's how you purchase a domain. Now I'll show you how to link it up to your click funnel in the next video.
